name: Goodie Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the caramels with evaporated milk over low heat.
2. Mix the cake mix, butter, milk, and chopped nuts by hand in a bowl. The mixture will be sticky.
3. Pour the batter into an oblong greased and floured cake pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 9 minutes.
5. Sprinkle chocolate chips over the crust.
6. Pour the caramel mixture over the chocolate chips.
7. Bake at 350°F for an additional 18 minutes.
